start.speaker: Zara the Traveller
start.text: Ah, a fellow wanderer! You have excellent timing — I've just arrived from the eastern kingdoms with the most extraordinary goods.

pitch.speaker: Zara the Traveller
pitch.text: Moonstones mined at the peak of the lunar eclipse. Elixirs brewed by mountain hermits. I won't be here long — I'm always moving.

open_shop.speaker: Zara the Traveller
open_shop.text: Browse freely! But don't wait too long — these items disappear quickly.

origin_story.speaker: Zara the Traveller
origin_story.text: I've been to the Frostpeak Mountains, the Sunscorch Desert, even the ruins near the Murkveil Swamp. Each place has its own treasures, if you know where to look.

origin_story_2.speaker: Zara the Traveller
origin_story_2.text: Travel the world, friend. There's more out there than you can imagine.

farewell.speaker: Zara the Traveller
farewell.text: May the road rise up to meet you! And if you see me again in your travels — do stop by.
